overview: This Mono-Red Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly by deploying cheap, aggressive creatures and leveraging combat damage triggers. Signature cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Screaming Nemesis provide early pressure and board control, while Eidolon of the Great Revel serves as the primary win condition by multiplying damage output. Success relies on maintaining relentless tempo and closing the game before opponents can stabilize.
win_conditions: Direct combat damage from early creatures
Repeatedly triggering Eidolon of the Great Revel to drain life totals
Using Screaming Nemesis to clear blockers or deal direct damage

keep_criteria: Hands with at least one turn-one creature
Hands containing Eidolon of the Great Revel with early triggers
Hands with Swiftspear paired with instant-speed removal
mulligan_criteria: Hands with only three-mana or higher cards
Hands lacking early creatures or damage triggers
Hands with multiple Eidolons or no lands

early_game: Play lands and Monastery Swiftspear immediately to establish pressure
Cast Screaming Nemesis to remove early threats or deal damage
Prioritize keeping the initiative and forcing opponent responses
mid_game: Trigger Eidolon of the Great Revel multiple times per turn using combat and spells
Trade efficiently to maintain board presence while pushing damage
Use removal to clear path for aggressive attacks
late_game: Rely on accumulated Eidolon triggers to close out the match
Accept that the deck falls off if the opponent stabilizes
Push all remaining damage through before opponent's card advantage takes over

key_cards.name: Monastery Swiftspear
key_cards.notes: Deploy on turn one to force early answers and establish a threatening board state.

key_cards.name: Screaming Nemesis
key_cards.notes: Use to remove key blockers or deal direct damage when the board is clear, maximizing tempo.

key_cards.name: Eidolon of the Great Revel
key_cards.notes: Cast when you can trigger it multiple times in a turn to rapidly reduce opponent's life total.

sequencing_tips: Hold Screaming Nemesis until the opponent's turn to protect your board or answer threats
Trigger Eidolon of the Great Revel after combat damage is dealt to maximize life loss
Play Swiftspear before casting other spells to ensure early pressure and force responses

matchups.advice: Push damage aggressively before they can assemble counterspells and board wipes
Race them by triggering Eidolon repeatedly and avoiding unfavorable trades
Use Nemesis to trade efficiently and protect your life total while racing
